common.dataUnavailable: Some live tourism data is temporarily unavailable.
common.routeGeneratedNote: This route was built from your selected destination and interests.
common.placeDescriptionFallback: A strong destination option for your next Baramiz route.

footer.description: A localized tourism discovery platform for Karakalpakstan, designed as a polished MVP competition demo.

categoryDescriptions.history: Fortresses, memorial routes, and places that explain the region's story.
categoryDescriptions.culture: Theaters, public spaces, and local traditions that bring the destination to life.
categoryDescriptions.museum: Museum stops that add context, structure, and credibility to the journey.
categoryDescriptions.nature: Open landscapes, remote viewpoints, and scenic travel moments.
categoryDescriptions.adventure: Road trips, fortress circuits, and outdoor movement across dramatic terrain.
categoryDescriptions.food: Markets, local dishes, and stops that make the route feel more human.
categoryDescriptions.family: Comfortable and practical places that work well for shared travel.

hero.title: Explore Karakalpakstan like a real travel platform
hero.description: Discover destinations, browse attractions, find tourism services, and use Baramiz as a polished route-planning layer inside a real travel product.

featuredDestinations.title: Start with a location, not a technical form
featuredDestinations.description: Each destination page combines attractions, services, food, and planning support into one scrollable travel experience.

themes.title: Quick categories for discovery
themes.description: Use live categories from the backend as fast entry points into the attraction catalog and destination pages.

featuredPlaces.title: Live attractions from the backend
featuredPlaces.description: Baramiz uses the real attraction API for featured destinations and falls back gracefully when image assets fail.
featuredPlaces.empty: Featured places will appear here when the backend returns them.

services.title: A service layer that makes the app feel real
services.description: Static demo services are acceptable for the MVP, but they need to look integrated with the destination discovery flow.

errors.dataUnavailable: Some live tourism data is temporarily unavailable, but the main browsing flow is still ready to explore.

hero.title: Browse Karakalpakstan by destination story
hero.description: Each destination combines attractions, travel services, experiences, and a polished handoff to route planning. This keeps the app focused on discovery first and practical planning second.

section.title: Choose the part of Karakalpakstan you want to explore
section.description: The four spotlight destinations are designed to cover the strongest discovery stories in the current MVP: culture, environmental history, fortresses, and remote landscapes.

errors.countsUnavailable: Destination counts are temporarily unavailable, but destination pages are still ready to open.

notFound.title: Destination not found
notFound.description: This destination is not available in the current MVP configuration.

errors.attractionsUnavailable: Attractions are temporarily unavailable for this destination.

attractions.title: What to see in {{name}}
attractions.description: Live attraction cards from the backend API, filtered by destination city or region logic.
attractions.empty: No attractions match the current interest filter yet.

experiences.title: Activities and travel moods
experiences.description: Derived from live place categories so the destination page feels broader than a basic attraction list.
experiences.defaultDescription: A themed experience layer for this destination.

experienceDescriptions.history: Explore fortresses, memorial sites, and the long regional story behind this destination.
experienceDescriptions.culture: Discover theaters, markets, and cultural spaces that make local travel feel alive.
experienceDescriptions.museum: Museum stops add context and structure to a polished discovery route.
experienceDescriptions.nature: Landscape-led travel for wide views, open space, and stronger regional contrast.
experienceDescriptions.food: Add local cuisine and market moments to make the destination feel complete.
experienceDescriptions.adventure: Remote routes, fortress drives, and outdoor travel for visitors who want motion and scenery.

accommodation.title: Where to stay
accommodation.description: Static demo cards are acceptable here because the goal is to make the platform feel like a real tourism product layer.

tours.title: Local support for the route
tours.description: Static demo offerings help the page feel like a destination hub, not just a database response.

food.title: Restaurants and local flavors
food.description: Food cards help complete the destination story and make the browsing flow feel more human and practical.

finalCta.title: Build a smart route for {{name}}
finalCta.description: Use this destination as the base, pick your interests, and get a practical itinerary with map-ready stops.

hero.title: Browse places across Karakalpakstan
hero.description: Filter by destination and category, then jump into destination pages or add a stop to your route planning flow.

errors.dataUnavailable: Some live attraction data is unavailable right now.

results.title: {{count}} places ready to explore
results.description: Large destination cards keep the attraction browser visual and useful instead of looking like a technical list.
results.empty: No places match the current filters yet.

hero.title: Tourism services for a fuller travel platform
hero.description: These sections are static demo content for the MVP, but they are styled and structured to make Baramiz feel like a real tourism service marketplace layered on top of destination discovery.

agencies.title: Tour agencies
agencies.description: Demo-ready operator cards for packaged tours, day trips, and regional visitor support.

items.title: Baramiz Local Tours
items.description: City routes, museum visits, and day-trip packaging for travelers starting in Nukus.

items.title: Aral Horizon Travel
items.description: A remote-region operator concept focused on Moynaq, the Aral Sea narrative, and scenic routes.

guides.title: Guides
guides.description: Local guide profiles for history, culture, and remote destination storytelling.

items.title: Heritage storyteller guide
items.description: Designed for travelers who want monuments, museums, and strong regional context.

items.title: Adventure route guide
items.description: A guide profile for fortress circuits, desert drives, and outdoor-focused day plans.

transport.title: Transport
transport.description: Practical transfer and vehicle support options for visitors moving between cities and remote sites.

items.title: City transfer service
items.description: Airport, hotel, and attraction transfers for visitors based in Nukus.

items.title: Regional driver support
items.description: Longer-distance transport for Ellikqala, Moynaq, and the Aral Sea region.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.description: Simple but polished stay options for city breaks, road trips, and overnight regional journeys.

items.title: Boutique city stay
items.description: Comfortable accommodation concept for travelers focusing on museums and city exploration.

items.title: Explorer lodge
items.description: A more flexible regional stay format for nature and road-trip travelers.

experiences.title: Cultural experiences
experiences.description: Add-on experiences that help the platform feel like a full tourism service layer, not just a place list.

items.title: Traditional music evening
items.description: A cultural showcase concept for visitors who want more than a sightseeing list.

items.title: Cuisine and market experience
items.description: A more hands-on food and market route built around local flavor and atmosphere.

hero.title: Build your route
hero.description: Choose a destination and interests, then let Baramiz return a practical route you can use right away.

form.title: Build a clear travel route
form.description: Choose a destination and interests. The result page will show a readable travel plan.

errors.generateFailed: The route could not be generated right now. Please try again.

1_day.label: 1 day
1_day.helper: Full-day route with more stops and variety.

empty.title: Your route will appear here
empty.description: Build a route from the Route Generator page after choosing a destination and interests.

hero.title: Your recommended route
hero.description: This route turns your selected destination and interests into a readable travel plan.

summary.title: Your trip - {{city}}
summary.description: A practical route plan you can review quickly, navigate immediately, and continue exploring across places, services, and destination pages.

itinerary.title: Suggested route plan
itinerary.description: A polished sequence of stops with timing, visuals, and reasoning for each recommendation.
itinerary.empty: The route is ready, but no stops were returned yet.

map.title: Route path on map
map.description: When place coordinates are available, Baramiz shows route order on map before navigation.
map.error: Map preview is not available because place data could not be loaded right now.
map.empty: No route coordinates are available yet, but your itinerary is ready.

plan.title: Route plan
plan.description: Review your stops, pick a point, and the map will focus on that location.

mapPanel.title: Map and navigation
mapPanel.description: Markers show your route stops. Select a place from the plan to focus the map.

actions.shareFailed: Could not share route right now.

hero.title: Explore places on map and build your travel path
hero.description: Switch between discovery mode and route mode. Select places, preview travel distance, then open navigation in Google Maps or Yandex Maps.

errors.partial: Some live data failed to load. You can still use available places and navigation tools.

empty.title: No places with coordinates found
empty.description: Try another city or category filter. Places without coordinates stay available in cards, but cannot be pinned on map yet.

sidebar.routeEmpty: Select places from map to build a route path with navigation links.
sidebar.exploreEmpty: No map-ready places for this filter. Try another city or category.

actions.copyEmpty: Select at least one place first.
actions.nearMeUnsupported: Geolocation is not available in this browser.

nukus.name: Nukus
nukus.summary: The easiest entry point into Karakalpakstan: museums, cultural landmarks, local markets, and strong city-based discovery.
nukus.overview: Nukus is the main cultural gateway for travelers who want art, museums, food, and a reliable base for exploring the wider region.

stays.title: Savitsky View Hotel
stays.description: A polished city stay concept near museums and cultural attractions, ideal for first-time visitors.

stays.title: Aral Gate Residence
stays.description: Comfortable rooms, business-friendly service, and easy transfers for travelers using Nukus as a base.

guides.title: City culture guide
guides.description: A local guide concept focused on museums, markets, and cultural storytelling in Nukus.

guides.title: Art and heritage companion
guides.description: Designed for visitors who want a deeper explanation of the city's creative and historical significance.

food.title: Traditional dinner stop
food.description: Local cuisine card for a comfortable evening stop with Karakalpak and Uzbek dishes.

food.title: Bazaar tasting route
food.description: A more casual market-focused food experience for quick tasting and local atmosphere.
food.meta: Best combined with a walking route

tours.title: Nukus highlights tour
tours.description: Museum, market, and culture stops packaged into a smooth city itinerary for a polished demo experience.

tours.title: Nukus to fortress route
tours.description: A city-plus-road-trip concept for visitors who want one urban day and one archaeological extension.

moynaq.name: Moynaq
moynaq.summary: A powerful destination for travelers interested in environmental history, dramatic landscapes, and one of the region's most iconic sites.
moynaq.overview: Moynaq combines visual impact with a strong story, making it a compelling destination for history-focused visitors and competition demos alike.

stays.title: Aralkum Guest House
stays.description: A small demo stay concept close to the main attraction area, designed for overnight visitors.

stays.title: Sea Story Lodge
stays.description: An atmospheric lodging concept for travelers coming specifically for the Aral Sea narrative.

guides.title: Ship cemetery guide
guides.description: A local guide concept focused on the historical and environmental story behind the site.

guides.title: Moynaq local companion
guides.description: Adds context, logistics support, and local perspective to a remote day trip.

food.title: Regional comfort cafe
food.description: A practical stop for travelers combining the ship cemetery and museum in one route.

food.title: Tea and local snacks
food.description: A lighter food stop concept for short visits and photography-led itineraries.

tours.title: Aral Sea memory route
tours.description: Combines the ship cemetery, museum, and historical explanation into one memorable visitor journey.

tours.title: Remote photography run
tours.description: A more visual route focused on landscape views, dramatic sites, and time for photo stops.

ellikqala.name: Ellikqala
ellikqala.summary: Ancient fortresses, desert scenery, and road-trip energy make Ellikqala one of the region's best adventure destinations.
ellikqala.overview: Ellikqala is ideal for travelers who want a more cinematic route built around archaeological sites and open landscapes.

stays.title: Fortress Camp Stay
stays.description: A road-trip lodging concept designed around early starts and open-air exploration.

stays.title: Heritage Base Camp
stays.description: A comfortable overnight option for travelers combining several fortress stops in one trip.

guides.title: Fortress route guide
guides.description: Helps connect archaeological context with the dramatic setting of Ellikqala's historic sites.

guides.title: Desert road companion
guides.description: A practical guide concept for travelers who want a smoother, safer remote excursion.

food.title: Roadside lunch stop
food.description: A simple route support option for fortress visitors spending most of the day outdoors.

food.title: Camp-style dinner
food.description: A more atmospheric experience card for groups who want a stronger desert travel vibe.

tours.title: Ayaz Kala adventure circuit
tours.description: A scenic multi-stop route built around fortress views and time on location.

tours.title: Ancient Khorezm route
tours.description: A more educational route concept connecting major ruins into one clear visitor experience.

aral-sea-region.name: Aral Sea region
aral-sea-region.summary: A broader regional journey that blends Moynaq and nearby remote viewpoints into one destination story for travelers seeking scale.
aral-sea-region.overview: The Aral Sea region experience is about dramatic environmental history, remote beauty, and memorable visual storytelling.

stays.title: Regional explorer lodge
stays.description: A flexible base concept for visitors combining Moynaq with wider Aral Sea region stops.

stays.title: Desert horizon camp
stays.description: A more atmospheric stay concept for travelers who want a landscape-driven itinerary.

guides.title: Regional nature guide
guides.description: Adds local context and route confidence to a wider Aral Sea region itinerary.

guides.title: Photography route host
guides.description: Designed for travelers prioritizing dramatic viewpoints and longer visual stops.

food.title: Regional rest stop
food.description: A practical meal stop concept for travelers moving between remote sights.

food.title: Campfire-style dinner
food.description: A demo cultural dining experience to make remote travel feel warmer and more memorable.

1.meta: Built for a fuller regional route

subtitles.places: Manage destination records and multilingual content
subtitles.categories: Maintain category definitions used across the platform

notices.backendFallback: Places CRUD now targets the real backend first. Local browser fallback appears only if a request fails or a specific admin resource is not available.
notices.localSave: Saved in local demo mode because admin write endpoints are not available right now.
notices.translationFallback: RU and EN were filled from Uzbek because a translation endpoint was not available. Review and edit the generated fields before saving.
notices.categoriesFallback: Categories could not be loaded from the backend. Fallback options are being used.

dashboard.pageDescription: Track the current state of places and categories, then jump into CRUD screens to keep the tourism catalog ready.
dashboard.recentDescription: A quick operational view of the latest place records in the admin dataset.
dashboard.categoryDescription: See which categories exist and how many places currently use them.

places.pageDescription: Manage tourism records with table-first CRUD actions, filters, and direct edit access.
places.filtersDescription: Search by name, city, or region, then open records directly in the editor.
places.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, city, or region
places.noResults: No places match the current filters.
places.dataUnavailable: Some admin data could not be loaded. You can still work with the records that are available.

categories.pageDescription: Maintain category records that structure discovery, filtering, and content management.
categories.dataUnavailable: Category data is partially unavailable right now.

messages.saveFailed: The category could not be saved right now.
messages.deleteFailed: The category could not be deleted right now.

form.pageCreateDescription: Add a new place record with operational metadata and multilingual content fields.
form.pageEditDescription: Update a place record, regenerate RU and EN from Uzbek when needed, and keep the catalog consistent.
form.basicDescription: Core location, category, media, and visibility settings used across the platform.
form.mediaDescription: Provide a direct image URL and the operational location data required for a real destination record.
form.imageDescription: Use a direct image URL. The public site falls back gracefully if the asset does not load.
form.uzDescription: Primary source text for the place. Use this as the editorial base for RU and EN generation.
form.kaaDescription: Manual local-language content that stays under editor control.
form.textsDescription: Uzbek is the primary source, Karakalpak is manual, and RU/EN can be generated then refined.
form.translationsDescription: Generate RU and EN from Uzbek, then edit both fields before saving.
form.rulesDescription: The admin panel makes each language workflow explicit so content stays operationally clear.

helpers.featured: Show this place in featured sections on the public site.
helpers.coordinates: Coordinates are optional but useful for future mapping support.
helpers.uzSource: Uzbek must be written manually. It is the source for RU and EN generation.
helpers.ruEnEditable: RU and EN remain editable after generation.

validation.durationMinutes: Duration must be a valid number greater than zero.
validation.latitude: Latitude must be a valid number.
validation.longitude: Longitude must be a valid number.
validation.uzSource: Add Uzbek name and description before generating RU/EN.

messages.notFound: This place could not be found.
messages.saveFailed: The place could not be saved right now.
messages.deleteFailed: The place could not be deleted right now.
messages.translationFailed: RU/EN generation failed. Continue editing the fields manually if needed.
messages.translationReady: RU and EN were generated from the live translation flow. Review both fields before saving.
